title: membership — Eloquent observers
description: Four observers, one per owned entity. MembershipObserver is the load-bearing one — enforces atomic invoice creation, frozen snapshots, entitlement consumption, state-machine transitions, immutability of athlete/plan, cross-tenant defense-in-depth. MembershipRenewalObserver drives the retry ladder + lapsed transition. MembershipPlanObserver gates plan creation on entitlements + capacity. PassObserver enforces per-period cap + consumption idempotence.

handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `mbr_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `membership_capture` feature (defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when Athlete.tenant_id != this.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when Branch.tenant_id != this.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when MembershipPlan.tenant_id != this.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when MembershipPlan.branch_id != this.branch_id (plans are per-branch)
creating → refuse when MembershipPlan.is_active = false (returns `MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_INACTIVE`)
creating → refuse when MembershipPlan.effective_from > now() OR MembershipPlan.effective_until < now() (returns `MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_NOT_EFFECTIVE`)
creating → refuse when MembershipPlan.current_active_members >= MembershipPlan.max_active_members (returns `MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_AT_CAPACITY`); fire MembershipPlanCapacityReached on approach
creating → refuse when primary_guardian_id set but AthleteGuardian.athlete_id != this.athlete_id OR AthleteGuardian.status != 'active' (returns `MEMBERSHIP_GUARDIAN_INVALID`)

creating → refuse when primary_guardian_id is null AND athlete is a minor (returns `MEMBERSHIP_GUARDIAN_REQUIRED` — the enforce_guardian_consent middleware normally catches this at HTTP; observer is defense-in-depth)
creating → refuse when active membership already exists for (tenant, athlete, plan) via partial unique index (returns `MEMBERSHIP_DUPLICATE`)
creating → refuse when plan.trial_days > 0 AND tenant lacks `membership_trial_periods` entitlement (returns `MEMBERSHIP_TRIAL_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when currency != plan.currency AND tenant lacks `membership_multi_currency` entitlement (returns `MEMBERSHIP_MULTI_CURRENCY_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → freeze price_snapshot_cents = plan.price_cents (immutable post-create)
creating → freeze currency = plan.currency
creating → freeze billing_interval = plan.billing_interval
creating → invoke tax::TaxCalculator.calculate(athlete.region_id, plan.price_cents, plan.currency) → freeze tax_calculation_id + tax_calculation_snapshot (immutable post-create)

creating → if coupon_id set: invoke coupon::CouponRedeemer.redeem(coupon_id, membership) with in-transaction row lock; freeze coupon_snapshot; if CouponRedeemer refuses (expired / max_uses reached / not applicable to plan), refuse the membership create with `MEMBERSHIP_COUPON_INVALID`
creating → set status='pending' (never allow status='active' or terminal on create)

creating → invoke CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated hook — creates invoice::Invoice in the same DB transaction with amount = price_snapshot_cents + tax_amount - coupon_discount; on failure, rolls back the membership create + fires `MEMBERSHIP_INVOICE_CREATE_FAILED` (500, retryable)
creating → enforce atomic_membership_invoice_creation rule as a post-hook assertion (invoice_id must be non-null on the invoice side of the transaction)
creating → increment plan.current_active_members
creating → fire MembershipCreated (post-commit)
creating → if plan.trial_days > 0: also fire MembershipTrialStarted

updating tenant_id / region_id / branch_id / athlete_id / membership_plan_id → REFUSE (returns `MEMBERSHIP_*_IMMUTABLE`). Plan changes go through explicit /upgrade + /downgrade endpoints that create new membership rows
updating price_snapshot_cents / currency / billing_interval / tax_calculation_id / tax_calculation_snapshot / coupon_id / coupon_snapshot → REFUSE (SNAPSHOT semantics — frozen at signing)
updating current_period_starts_at / current_period_ends_at → allowed ONLY from ExtendPeriodOnRenewalSucceeded hook (checked via Bus::isDispatchedFromJob)

updating status pending → active → refuse when parent invoice.status != 'paid' (returns `MEMBERSHIP_INVOICE_UNPAID`); compute current_period_starts_at = now() + current_period_ends_at = now() + billing_interval; set next_renewal_at = current_period_ends_at (null for lifetime); dispatch IssuePassesForPeriodJob; fire MembershipActivated + (if trial) fire nothing extra (still pending state) OR (if not trial) fire MembershipTrialConverted if we came from trial
updating status active → paused → set state_reason='admin_pause'; freeze next_renewal_at (retain original); fire MembershipPaused
updating status paused → active → recompute next_renewal_at = now() + remaining_period_days; fire MembershipResumed
updating status active/paused → cancelled → refuse when cancellation_reason unset (returns `MEMBERSHIP_CANCELLATION_REASON_REQUIRED`)

→ cancellation_kind='soft_period_end' (default): set cancelled_at=now(), cancellation_effective_at=current_period_ends_at, next_renewal_at=null; membership STAYS in active status until ExpireMembershipJob transitions it at cancellation_effective_at; passes remain valid through the period

→ cancellation_kind='hard_immediate': refuse when tenant lacks `membership_hard_cancel_prorated_refund` entitlement AND plan.refund_policy IN ('prorated', 'full_within_grace') (returns `MEMBERSHIP_HARD_CANCEL_NOT_ENTITLED`); set cancelled_at=now(), cancellation_effective_at=now(); transition directly to cancelled; invoke CalculateProratedRefundOnHardCancel hook to schedule the refund; ExpirePassesOnMembershipCancelled expires remaining passes
→ decrement plan.current_active_members
→ fire MembershipCancelled

updating status active/paused → lapsed → refuse when caller is not RetryFailedRenewalJob OR LapseMembershipJob context (checked via Bus::isDispatchedFromJob); set lapsed_at=now(), expires_at=now(); invoke ExpirePassesOnMembershipLapsed; decrement plan.current_active_members; fire MembershipLapsed
updating status active → expired → refuse when caller is not ExpireMembershipJob context; set expires_at=now(); decrement plan.current_active_members; fire MembershipExpired
updating status → refunded → refuse when caller is not the refund module context (post-refund-completion); record refund_id + refund_amount_cents in metadata; fire MembershipRefunded
updating status transitions not in the allowed set → refuse via valid_state_transition rule with `MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_TRANSITION_INVALID`
updating consecutive_failed_renewal_count → allowed from MembershipRenewalObserver ONLY (checked via calling context)
updating lifetime_value_cents → allowed from ExtendPeriodOnRenewalSucceeded hook ONLY (monotonically increases; never decreases even on refund — refund tracked separately)
deleting (soft-delete) → refuse when status IN ('active', 'paused', 'pending') — must transition to a terminal state first (returns `MEMBERSHIP_ACTIVE_CANNOT_DELETE`)
deleting (hard-delete) → RESTRICT while any Wave 4+ Invoice / Transaction / Payment / Refund / Chargeback / Pass rows reference; allow only after retention window (7 or 10 years)
creating → populate ULID prefix `mbp_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `membership_capture` feature
creating → refuse when Branch.tenant_id != this.tenant_id
creating → refuse when age_group_id set AND AgeGroup.tenant_id != this.tenant_id
creating → consume 1 unit of `membership_plan_slot` entitlement; refuse with `MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_QUOTA_EXCEEDED` when cap reached
creating → validate billing_interval enum + billing_interval_count > 0
creating → validate price_cents >= 0 + currency ISO 4217 (via valid_positive_price + valid_currency rules)
creating → validate trial_days >= 0 AND trial_days <= 90
creating → validate refund_policy + refund_grace_days consistency: 'full_within_grace' requires refund_grace_days > 0; 'no_refund' requires refund_grace_days = 0
creating → validate effective_from < effective_until when both set (valid_effective_range rule)
creating → validate slug uniqueness within (tenant_id, branch_id) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
creating → validate prerequisites JSONB shape (valid_prerequisites_shape rule)
creating → validate addon_config JSONB shape (valid_addon_config_shape rule)
creating → validate max_active_members > 0 when set
creating → set current_active_members = 0
creating → fire MembershipPlanCreated
updating price_cents → allowed for future memberships; existing memberships keep their frozen price_snapshot_cents (never retroactively re-priced)
updating currency → refuse when active memberships exist on this plan (returns `MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_CURRENCY_LOCKED`)
updating billing_interval → refuse when active memberships exist (returns `MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_INTERVAL_LOCKED`)
updating branch_id / age_group_id → refuse (returns `MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_*_IMMUTABLE`; plans belong to one branch/age-group for their lifetime)
updating slug → validate uniqueness within (tenant_id, branch_id)

updating is_active → false: invoke PreventPlanArchiveWithActiveMemberships hook; refuse when active memberships reference the plan (returns `MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_HAS_ACTIVE_MEMBERSHIPS`); on success release 1 unit of membership_plan_slot + fire MembershipPlanArchived
updating current_active_members → allowed ONLY from MembershipObserver create/cancel handlers
deleting (soft-delete) → refuse when active memberships reference the plan
creating → populate ULID prefix `mbn_`
creating → refuse when parent Membership.tenant_id != this.tenant_id
creating → refuse when parent Membership.status NOT IN ('active', 'paused') (returns `MEMBERSHIP_RENEWAL_MEMBERSHIP_INACTIVE`)
creating → set attempt_number = 1 for a fresh renewal cycle OR = (max attempt_number for this membership's current period + 1) for a retry
creating → set period_starts_at = membership.next_renewal_at + period_ends_at = period_starts_at + membership.billing_interval
creating → recompute tax + coupon for the NEW period (do NOT reuse membership's frozen snapshots — those are for the ORIGINAL signing); coupon renewability tenant-configurable
creating → set status='pending'; dispatch ChargeMembershipPaymentIntentJob
creating → fire nothing on create (renewal events fire on terminal status transitions)
updating status pending → attempting → set attempted_at = now()

updating status attempting → succeeded → refuse when parent invoice for the period is not paid; set succeeded_at = now(); invoke ExtendPeriodOnRenewalSucceeded hook (extends membership.next_renewal_at + issues passes for new period + resets membership.consecutive_failed_renewal_count + increments membership.lifetime_value_cents); fire MembershipRenewed on first-attempt success OR MembershipRenewalRecovered on retry-attempt success (attempt_number > 1)

updating status attempting → failed_transient → set failed_at = now(); set failure_reason; increment membership.consecutive_failed_renewal_count; if attempt_number < 4: compute next_attempt_at (day+3 for attempt 1, day+7 for attempt 2, day+14 for attempt 3); fire MembershipRenewalFailed

updating status attempting → failed_permanent → set failed_at = now(); set failure_reason; increment membership.consecutive_failed_renewal_count; dispatch LapseMembershipJob to transition membership to lapsed; fire MembershipRenewalFailed
updating attempt_number >= 4 AND status transitions to failed_transient → treat as failed_permanent (final attempt exhausted); dispatch LapseMembershipJob
updating status → cancelled → allowed only when parent membership transitions to cancelled/lapsed before the renewal completes; no-op the retry ladder
updating any other fields → REFUSE (append-only semantics; renewal rows are audit records)
deleting (any) → REFUSE (append-only; retention is 7 years financial)
creating → populate ULID prefix `pss_`
creating → refuse when parent Membership.tenant_id != this.tenant_id
creating → refuse when parent Membership.status NOT IN ('active', 'paused') (returns `PASS_MEMBERSHIP_INACTIVE`); paused memberships can hold passes but consumption is refused
creating → enforce plan.passes_per_period cap when parent's IssuePassesForPeriodJob triggers create — refuse when the period already has passes_per_period issued
creating → validate valid_from < valid_until
creating → set consumed_at = null (never allow initial consumption on create)
creating → fire PassIssued

updating consumed_at → set from null: refuse when consumed_at already set (idempotence — returns `PASS_ALREADY_CONSUMED`); refuse when now() < valid_from OR now() > valid_until (returns `PASS_OUTSIDE_VALID_WINDOW`); refuse when parent membership status = 'paused' (returns `PASS_MEMBERSHIP_PAUSED`); link to consumed_by_session_id (Wave 3+ session module); fire PassConsumed
updating consumed_at → set to null (reversal): allowed only from admin PassRefunder context; set refunded_at + refund_reason; fire PassRefunded
updating valid_from / valid_until → REFUSE (immutable — the plan decided this at issuance)
updating pass_type → REFUSE (immutable)
updating membership_id → REFUSE
deleting (soft-delete) → allowed for admin cleanup + Wave 4+ ExpireStalePassesJob
